goal: Tonight velocity: deliverable UI + 3-phase scope + multi-phase orchestration

phase_model.note: Testing is always its own phase when selected — not implicit in full_stack only

loaded_context.rule: When phases skip one stack end but include the other end + testing, the skipped end must already be loaded (not built in this run).

frontend_testing.because: UI tests need an API/backend to run against

backend_testing.because: integration tests need a client surface to exercise the API

testing_only.because: standalone test phase needs a built stack to verify

sprints.intent: Add phase selector at terminal start: user picks which of backend, frontend, testing to run (7 presets or toggles). Store ordered phases[] in session via POST /api/v1/orchestrate/prepare. Show Phases: Backend → Testing on blueprint card. Testing is its own phase.

Multi-phase skeleton: advance-phase API after merge_complete moves through phases[] (backend→frontend→testing). Dynamic stage rail shows only selected phases. Stub blueprints per phase. Mock tests for all 7 presets.
Deliverable panel polish: View diff, Copy path, Start new, per-worker validation breakdown.
Geometry-conditioned task isolation: Dark Bridge union-find atomic blocks, κ≥0 parallel contraction, stealth serialization logs.
